calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-14-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

John Fitzpatrick Vannucci, Esq. appeared with plaintiffs Nick Koier and John Aviles, who were placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Michael Ruminer or Codewidget, Inc.
Defaults were entered against defendants on June 13, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 2, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Nick Koier and John Aviles, and against the Defaulted Defendants Michael Ruminer and Codewidget, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $96,786.70.
Prejudgment Interest - $10,772.35.
Attorney's Fees - $18,000.00, for a total in the amount of $125,559.05.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
